args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
prepare_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- prepare prefill-path --out "$bundle_dir")
printf '%s' "$prepare_out" | grep -q 'intent=prefill_path'
printf '%s' "$prepare_out" | grep -q 'regions=prefill_attention'
printf '%s' "$prepare_out" | grep -q 'readiness=Correctness'
grep -q '"name":"prefill_attention"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
printf 'prepared\n'
